headline: Linde plc (LIN): One of the Promising Low Risk High Growth Stocks?
summary: We just covered the 14 Best Low Risk High Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now and Linde plc (NASDAQ:LIN) ranks 12th on this list. Industrial gas companies are often seen as mature businesses. However, Linde plc (NASDAQ:LIN) is considered a mature growth option because of the profile it has in the clean hydrogen and semiconductor […]

headline: Linde Declares Dividend in Second Quarter 2026
summary: WOKING, England, April 27, 2026--Linde plc (Nasdaq: LIN) announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.60 per share.

headline: Linde plc Declares Dividend in Second Quarter of 2026, Payable on June 18, 2026
summary: Linde plc announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.60 per share. The dividend is payable on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 4, 2026....
